name: MultiplyNTTs
label: Algorithm 11

inputs.name: f_hat
inputs.description: First NTT representation as 256-element array modulo q

inputs.name: g_hat
inputs.description: Second NTT representation as 256-element array modulo q

outputs.name: h_hat
outputs.description: Product of f_hat and g_hat in T_q as 256-element array modulo q

body_raw: (h_hat[2i], h_hat[2i + 1]) ← BaseCaseMultiply(f_hat[2i], f_hat[2i + 1], g_hat[2i], g_hat[2i + 1], zeta^(2*BitRev7(i)+1))
